nasb.text: but now, with no further place for me in these regions, and since I have had for many years a longing to come to you

esv.text: But now, since I no longer have any room for work in these regions, and since I have longed for many years to come to you,

cnv.text: 但現在這一帶再沒有可傳的地方，而我多年來又很想去見你們，

ccb.text: 但如今福音传遍了这一带，况且我几年来一直盼望去你们那里，

csbs.text: 但如今，这些地区再没有可传的地方了，况且多年来我一直渴望见到你们。
